id: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben__c5-sentence-window__0000
text: A cyberattack can have major consequences. [Report](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/rapporten/index.html). [Technology, Media & Telecom](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/technologie/index.html). ![](https://assets.abnamro.com/api/public/content/shutterstock-2145573827-landscape-16x9.jpg?t=h320). 22/05/2024 • 3 minutes read. [Julia Krauwer](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/auteurs/julia-krauwer/index.html). Business operations grinding to a halt, customers walking away; a cyberattack can severely damage a company. The costs Dutch companies incur as a result of such attacks are among the highest in the world.

[Julia Krauwer](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/auteurs/julia-krauwer/index.html). Business operations grinding to a halt, customers walking away; a cyberattack can severely damage a company. The costs Dutch companies incur as a result of such attacks are among the highest in the world. DP World, a large Australian port operator, had to [close](https://www.volkskrant.nl/buitenland/australische-havens-weer-open-na-cyberaanval-wel-achterstand-van-30-000-zeecontainers~bb4dfe8f/) four ports after a cyberattack at the end of 2023. The systems were taken offline from the internet, so lorries could no longer drop off or pick up cargo at the ports.

text: Business operations grinding to a halt, customers walking away; a cyberattack can severely damage a company. The costs Dutch companies incur as a result of such attacks are among the highest in the world. DP World, a large Australian port operator, had to [close](https://www.volkskrant.nl/buitenland/australische-havens-weer-open-na-cyberaanval-wel-achterstand-van-30-000-zeecontainers~bb4dfe8f/) four ports after a cyberattack at the end of 2023. id: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben__c5-sentence-window__0004
text: The costs Dutch companies incur as a result of such attacks are among the highest in the world. DP World, a large Australian port operator, had to [close](https://www.volkskrant.nl/buitenland/australische-havens-weer-open-na-cyberaanval-wel-achterstand-van-30-000-zeecontainers~bb4dfe8f/) four ports after a cyberattack at the end of 2023. The systems were taken offline from the internet, so lorries could no longer drop off or pick up cargo at the ports. Thirty thousand containers were stranded on site. metadata.chunk_id: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben__c5-sentence-window__0004
metadata.source_slug: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben

id: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben__c5-sentence-window__0005
text: DP World, a large Australian port operator, had to [close](https://www.volkskrant.nl/buitenland/australische-havens-weer-open-na-cyberaanval-wel-achterstand-van-30-000-zeecontainers~bb4dfe8f/) four ports after a cyberattack at the end of 2023. The systems were taken offline from the internet, so lorries could no longer drop off or pick up cargo at the ports. Thirty thousand containers were stranded on site. Operations were only back to their previous level after a week. Earlier this year, German battery manufacturer Varta was also [hit](https://www.security.nl/posting/830874/Productie+batterijfabrikant+Varta+ligt+nog+altijd+stil+wegens+cyberaanval#:~:text=De%20Duitse%20batterijfabrikant%20Varta%20is,de%20productie%20nog%20stil%20ligt) by a cyberattack.

text: The systems were taken offline from the internet, so lorries could no longer drop off or pick up cargo at the ports. Thirty thousand containers were stranded on site. Operations were only back to their previous level after a week. Earlier this year, German battery manufacturer Varta was also [hit](https://www.security.nl/posting/830874/Productie+batterijfabrikant+Varta+ligt+nog+altijd+stil+wegens+cyberaanval#:~:text=De%20Duitse%20batterijfabrikant%20Varta%20is,de%20productie%20nog%20stil%20ligt) by a cyberattack. The company had to shut down five factories.

text: Thirty thousand containers were stranded on site. Operations were only back to their previous level after a week. The company had to shut down five factories. Because the finance department was also affected, publication of the annual report was postponed.

The company had to shut down five factories. Because the finance department was also affected, publication of the annual report was postponed. Varta’s share price fell by almost five per cent.

id: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben__c5-sentence-window__0009
text: Earlier this year, German battery manufacturer Varta was also [hit](https://www.security.nl/posting/830874/Productie+batterijfabrikant+Varta+ligt+nog+altijd+stil+wegens+cyberaanval#:~:text=De%20Duitse%20batterijfabrikant%20Varta%20is,de%20productie%20nog%20stil%20ligt) by a cyberattack. The company had to shut down five factories. Because the finance department was also affected, publication of the annual report was postponed. Varta’s share price fell by almost five per cent. Worldwide, a [quarter](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/content/dam/pan/en_US/assets/pdf/reports/state-of-ot-security-report-2024.pdf) of industrial companies have had to halt operations at some point due to a cyberattack.

text: The company had to shut down five factories. Because the finance department was also affected, publication of the annual report was postponed. Varta’s share price fell by almost five per cent. Worldwide, a [quarter](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/content/dam/pan/en_US/assets/pdf/reports/state-of-ot-security-report-2024.pdf) of industrial companies have had to halt operations at some point due to a cyberattack. Alertness ebbs away.

metadata.chunk_id: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben__c5-sentence-window__0010
metadata.source_slug: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben
metadata.source_title: A cyberattack can have major consequences

id: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben__c5-sentence-window__0011
text: Because the finance department was also affected, publication of the annual report was postponed. Varta’s share price fell by almost five per cent. Worldwide, a [quarter](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/content/dam/pan/en_US/assets/pdf/reports/state-of-ot-security-report-2024.pdf) of industrial companies have had to halt operations at some point due to a cyberattack. Alertness ebbs away. Although ABN AMRO’s research shows that organisations are more aware of cyber risks after an attack, there is no guarantee that this alertness will be lasting after a successful attack, says Arwi van der Sluijs, Managing Director of cybersecurity service provider NFIR. “Half a year after an attack we get a call asking whether the measures ‘really have to be that strict’.” NFIR focuses specifically on the upper end of small and medium-sized enterprises, healthcare institutions, municipalities and provincial institutions.

id: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben__c5-sentence-window__0012
text: Varta’s share price fell by almost five per cent. Worldwide, a [quarter](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/content/dam/pan/en_US/assets/pdf/reports/state-of-ot-security-report-2024.pdf) of industrial companies have had to halt operations at some point due to a cyberattack. Alertness ebbs away. Although ABN AMRO’s research shows that organisations are more aware of cyber risks after an attack, there is no guarantee that this alertness will be lasting after a successful attack, says Arwi van der Sluijs, Managing Director of cybersecurity service provider NFIR. “Half a year after an attack we get a call asking whether the measures ‘really have to be that strict’.” NFIR focuses specifically on the upper end of small and medium-sized enterprises, healthcare institutions, municipalities and provincial institutions. In the Netherlands, median costs due to cyberattacks in 2023 were around 21,000 dollars per company, insurer [Hiscox](https://www.hiscoxgroup.com/sites/group/files/documents/2023-10/Hiscox-Cyber-Readiness-Report-2023.pdf) reports.

id: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben__c5-sentence-window__0013
text: Worldwide, a [quarter](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/content/dam/pan/en_US/assets/pdf/reports/state-of-ot-security-report-2024.pdf) of industrial companies have had to halt operations at some point due to a cyberattack. Alertness ebbs away. Although ABN AMRO’s research shows that organisations are more aware of cyber risks after an attack, there is no guarantee that this alertness will be lasting after a successful attack, says Arwi van der Sluijs, Managing Director of cybersecurity service provider NFIR. “Half a year after an attack we get a call asking whether the measures ‘really have to be that strict’.” NFIR focuses specifically on the upper end of small and medium-sized enterprises, healthcare institutions, municipalities and provincial institutions. In the Netherlands, median costs due to cyberattacks in 2023 were around 21,000 dollars per company, insurer [Hiscox](https://www.hiscoxgroup.com/sites/group/files/documents/2023-10/Hiscox-Cyber-Readiness-Report-2023.pdf) reports. This puts our country second worldwide in terms of highest financial damage from cybercrime, behind the United Kingdom and just ahead of the United States.

text: Alertness ebbs away. Although ABN AMRO’s research shows that organisations are more aware of cyber risks after an attack, there is no guarantee that this alertness will be lasting after a successful attack, says Arwi van der Sluijs, Managing Director of cybersecurity service provider NFIR. “Half a year after an attack we get a call asking whether the measures ‘really have to be that strict’.” NFIR focuses specifically on the upper end of small and medium-sized enterprises, healthcare institutions, municipalities and provincial institutions. In the Netherlands, median costs due to cyberattacks in 2023 were around 21,000 dollars per company, insurer [Hiscox](https://www.hiscoxgroup.com/sites/group/files/documents/2023-10/Hiscox-Cyber-Readiness-Report-2023.pdf) reports. This puts our country second worldwide in terms of highest financial damage from cybercrime, behind the United Kingdom and just ahead of the United States. Damage from cyberattacks takes many forms.

id: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben__c5-sentence-window__0015
text: Although ABN AMRO’s research shows that organisations are more aware of cyber risks after an attack, there is no guarantee that this alertness will be lasting after a successful attack, says Arwi van der Sluijs, Managing Director of cybersecurity service provider NFIR. “Half a year after an attack we get a call asking whether the measures ‘really have to be that strict’.” NFIR focuses specifically on the upper end of small and medium-sized enterprises, healthcare institutions, municipalities and provincial institutions. In the Netherlands, median costs due to cyberattacks in 2023 were around 21,000 dollars per company, insurer [Hiscox](https://www.hiscoxgroup.com/sites/group/files/documents/2023-10/Hiscox-Cyber-Readiness-Report-2023.pdf) reports. This puts our country second worldwide in terms of highest financial damage from cybercrime, behind the United Kingdom and just ahead of the United States. Damage from cyberattacks takes many forms. Insurer Hiscox sheds light in its annual [Cyber Readiness Report](https://www.hiscoxgroup.com/sites/group/files/documents/2023-10/Hiscox-Cyber-Readiness-Report-2023.pdf) on the different negative consequences companies experienced due to a cyberattack.

metadata.chunk_id: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben__c5-sentence-window__0015
metadata.source_slug: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben
metadata.source_title: A cyberattack can have major consequences

id: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben__c5-sentence-window__0016
text: In the Netherlands, median costs due to cyberattacks in 2023 were around 21,000 dollars per company, insurer [Hiscox](https://www.hiscoxgroup.com/sites/group/files/documents/2023-10/Hiscox-Cyber-Readiness-Report-2023.pdf) reports. This puts our country second worldwide in terms of highest financial damage from cybercrime, behind the United Kingdom and just ahead of the United States. Damage from cyberattacks takes many forms. Insurer Hiscox sheds light in its annual [Cyber Readiness Report](https://www.hiscoxgroup.com/sites/group/files/documents/2023-10/Hiscox-Cyber-Readiness-Report-2023.pdf) on the different negative consequences companies experienced due to a cyberattack. Most reported in 2023 were costs for notifying customers (31 per cent of the affected companies), followed by partner data leaks (26 per cent).

metadata.chunk_id: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben__c5-sentence-window__0016
metadata.source_slug: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben
metadata.source_title: A cyberattack can have major consequences

id: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben__c5-sentence-window__0017
text: This puts our country second worldwide in terms of highest financial damage from cybercrime, behind the United Kingdom and just ahead of the United States. Damage from cyberattacks takes many forms. Insurer Hiscox sheds light in its annual [Cyber Readiness Report](https://www.hiscoxgroup.com/sites/group/files/documents/2023-10/Hiscox-Cyber-Readiness-Report-2023.pdf) on the different negative consequences companies experienced due to a cyberattack. Most reported in 2023 were costs for notifying customers (31 per cent of the affected companies), followed by partner data leaks (26 per cent). Strikingly, the latter figure increased by as much as four percentage points compared with the previous year — a confirmation that cyber risks are not limited to a company’s own operations.

id: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben__c5-sentence-window__0018
text: Damage from cyberattacks takes many forms. Insurer Hiscox sheds light in its annual [Cyber Readiness Report](https://www.hiscoxgroup.com/sites/group/files/documents/2023-10/Hiscox-Cyber-Readiness-Report-2023.pdf) on the different negative consequences companies experienced due to a cyberattack. Most reported in 2023 were costs for notifying customers (31 per cent of the affected companies), followed by partner data leaks (26 per cent). Strikingly, the latter figure increased by as much as four percentage points compared with the previous year — a confirmation that cyber risks are not limited to a company’s own operations. At 16 per cent of companies, such incidents even led to the loss of partners.

metadata.chunk_id: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben__c5-sentence-window__0018
metadata.source_slug: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben
metadata.source_title: A cyberattack can have major consequences

id: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben__c5-sentence-window__0019
text: Insurer Hiscox sheds light in its annual [Cyber Readiness Report](https://www.hiscoxgroup.com/sites/group/files/documents/2023-10/Hiscox-Cyber-Readiness-Report-2023.pdf) on the different negative consequences companies experienced due to a cyberattack. Most reported in 2023 were costs for notifying customers (31 per cent of the affected companies), followed by partner data leaks (26 per cent). Strikingly, the latter figure increased by as much as four percentage points compared with the previous year — a confirmation that cyber risks are not limited to a company’s own operations. At 16 per cent of companies, such incidents even led to the loss of partners. A quarter of organisations reported negative effects on the brand or corporate reputation; at around a fifth, customers walked away, or they experienced difficulties attracting new customers.

metadata.chunk_id: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben__c5-sentence-window__0019
metadata.source_slug: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben
metadata.source_title: A cyberattack can have major consequences

id: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben__c5-sentence-window__0020
text: Most reported in 2023 were costs for notifying customers (31 per cent of the affected companies), followed by partner data leaks (26 per cent). Strikingly, the latter figure increased by as much as four percentage points compared with the previous year — a confirmation that cyber risks are not limited to a company’s own operations. At 16 per cent of companies, such incidents even led to the loss of partners. A quarter of organisations reported negative effects on the brand or corporate reputation; at around a fifth, customers walked away, or they experienced difficulties attracting new customers. Many companies also saw their performance worsen (24 per cent); at 21 per cent, there was even a threat to the organisation’s viability.

Entrepreneurs should protect themselves against cyberattacks. You can do this in three relatively simple steps.

id: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben__c5-sentence-window__0024
text: Many companies also saw their performance worsen (24 per cent); at 21 per cent, there was even a threat to the organisation’s viability. Measures to reduce risks. Entrepreneurs should protect themselves against cyberattacks. You can do this in three relatively simple steps. First, carry out a risk analysis to map which matters are crucial for keeping the business running and maintaining service levels.

metadata.chunk_id: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben__c5-sentence-window__0024
metadata.source_slug: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben
metadata.source_title: A cyberattack can have major consequences

id: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben__c5-sentence-window__0025
text: Measures to reduce risks. Entrepreneurs should protect themselves against cyberattacks. You can do this in three relatively simple steps. First, carry out a risk analysis to map which matters are crucial for keeping the business running and maintaining service levels. Second, take measures such as encouraging safe behaviour among employees, recording who owns specific data and discussing cyber risks with partners and suppliers.

metadata.chunk_id: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben__c5-sentence-window__0025
metadata.source_slug: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben
metadata.source_title: A cyberattack can have major consequences

id: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben__c5-sentence-window__0026
text: Entrepreneurs should protect themselves against cyberattacks. You can do this in three relatively simple steps. First, carry out a risk analysis to map which matters are crucial for keeping the business running and maintaining service levels. Second, take measures such as encouraging safe behaviour among employees, recording who owns specific data and discussing cyber risks with partners and suppliers. Finally, develop procedures to detect and handle cyber incidents.
